task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the Aged Receivables report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Aged Receivables' report open in the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Identify the target customer with the highest > 90 days overdue balance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Aged Receivables report clearly displaying 'Stop-N-Shop' with a balance in the > 90 days column.
Screenshot showing the Customers list or tab open in Manager.io.

task_completion.description: Open the edit screen for the target customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the edit form or settings page specifically for the customer 'Stop-N-Shop'.
Screenshot showing the credit limit option enabled/checked and the value '100' or '100.00' entered into the corresponding field for 'Stop-N-Shop'.
Screenshot showing the agent clicking the 'Update'/'Save' button, or a confirmation screen showing the customer 'Stop-N-Shop' has been successfully updated.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard web/desktop GUI interactions with Manager.io, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the credit limits of decoy customers.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots show the agent editing the records for 'Save-a-Lot Markets' or 'Quick-Stop Groceries'.

integrity.description: The agent actually viewed the Aged Receivables report before making changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a chronological progression where the Aged Receivables report is viewed prior to the agent navigating to the Customers tab to edit 'Stop-N-Shop'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target customer: 'Stop-N-Shop' (has the highest >90 days overdue balance of $5000). Expected credit limit: 100.0. Decoy customers: 'Save-a-Lot Markets' (high current balance) and 'Quick-Stop Groceries' (low overdue balance) must NOT be modified. The agent must use the 'Aged Receivables' report to determine the correct customer.
